author: Авакумов Данил Эдуардович
objective: Define and implement BDC_PACKET_V2 so real workflow cases, tested variants, constraints, and evidence can be represented without loss of decision-critical information.
research_question: What packet schema and data models are required so BDC CLI v2 can reason about real multi-agent architecture decisions rather than toy descriptors only?

execution_rules.phase_gate: May start only after TASK-7440 is SUCCESS.

tests_required: invalid packets fail with explicit reasons
backward-compat adapter from v1 descriptor to v2 packet works
TextAI_Auto packet is expressible without losing tested-variant facts
definition_of_done: packet quality levels represented in schema layer
TextAI_Auto fully representable in v2 packet
out_of_scope: role ontology semantics beyond schema support
